asset.title: Finance Model Solve
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, highly legible stylized trace replay showing an AI agent locking cells, writing formulas, and releasing locks in a financial model.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates cell locking, formula writing, and versioning steps clearly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows full sequence from initial lock to step-by-step edits and final release.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean, high-contrast dark theme with clear color-coded status indicators.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the spreadsheet cell and agent trace concepts.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Stylized but highly informative representation of backend agent execution.

legibility.evidence: Text and formulas are perfectly readable at standard browser sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly relevant to financial modeling and automated spreadsheet auditing.

productionHonesty.evidence: Explicitly labels itself as a 'Stylized trace replay' to avoid misleading.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Stylized trace replay showing an AI agent locking cells, reading context, writing formulas, and releasing locks in a financial model.
